item.title: Quantum Hardware
item.description: Quantum Hardware Leaf note without a corresponding directory: superconducting qubits, trapped ions, photonics.

item.title: Quantum Computing
item.description: Quantum Computing Notes on quantum computing — qubits, algorithms, and hardware. See Qubits and Shor's Algorithm to start.

item.title: Bookmarks
item.description: Bookmarks A flat leaf note — no folder of children, just links worth keeping. Papers to read Talks to rewatch Tools to try

item.title: Qubits
item.description: Qubits A qubit is the basic unit of quantum information — a two-state quantum system that can exist in superposition. Bloch sphere representation Superposi

item.title: Shor's Algorithm
item.description: Shor's Algorithm Polynomial-time quantum algorithm for integer factorization. Threatens RSA — see Cryptography. Reduce factoring to order-finding Solve ord
